headline: Can McDonald's Support Franchisee Margins Amid Inflation Pressure?
summary: Can MCD protect franchisee margins as beef inflation, energy costs and value pricing pressure restaurant economics?

headline: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) Tops 'Caviar Cruise' Quality Screen with Debt-Free Balance Sheet and 21.57% ROIC
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill passes the rigorous "Caviar Cruise" quality screen with high profitability, zero debt, and strong cash conversion. Its premium valuation reflects excellent long-term wealth-building potential.
